domain: mathematical logic (Löb's theorem, provability of consistency)
specific_mechanism: Löb-theorem-style obstruction to provable self-soundness applied to LLM self-confidence
llm_application: claim: LLM agents cannot produce well-calibrated self-confidence in their own outputs about hard tasks; the calibration must be off because perfect self-calibration would constitute a Löb-style internal proof of soundness
novelty_claim: specific formal-logic bridge — current LLM self-consistency literature is empirical not Löb-theorem-grounded
